ref: The young man said, “I have obeyed all of these. What else must I do?”
text: Ninfɛ di okosopo nwu nkpo latɔkɔ Yesu alɛ, “Ntoole afiofa ya mmle amuu. Lɛsaa lewo lebu kakple mbla ni?”
translated: I’m sorry, but I don’t have enough knowledge of the Selee language to provide an accurate translation.

text: Diekye batanu kasɔ di lɛsaatuo le ninsi ni diɛ bloblo wɔ aata ma baale ni kamɛ, ditabudi ma diekye batafũ baanu. Yesu Lakya Batii Sifiɛ Di Genesaret.

text: Kamadiki ntuo ye nlɛ, ami, Otii Obi nwu, nkpe osie kaayi ka mmle alɛ kayɔ okpile nkyɛ.” Nkpo oso aatɔkɔ otii nwu niafefee aate ni kaasɔ alɛ, “Taka fayila, faayɔ ɔkla lɛfɔ, faatɔɔkyɛ leyo.”
